DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND TO INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAKAM M. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE THE PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA WOODSON; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2017 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2016 Set For Case Management Conference On Mar-08-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication - Notice Of Motion And Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Henry Y. Huang for Plaintiff Juan B. Panti-Lopez the moving party.
No appearance for the opposing party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JUAN PANTI-LOPEZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication - Notice Of Motion And Hearing is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party prepare order in compliance with CCP 437c(g). Order signed and filed in open court. Plaintiff's Counsel to submit a Judgment. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Second Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. PLAINTIFF JAUN PANTI-LOPEZ Second Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions is GRANTED. Within ten days of entry of the Court's order granting the motion, Plaintiff shall pay sanctions in the amount of $1,000 to Defendant. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Gray; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2016 Set For Trial On Dec-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And To Interrogatories
Off Calendar May-20-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. PLAINTIFF JAUN PANTI-LOPEZ Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And To Interrogatories is GRANTED. Defendant HAKAM M. ABDELFATTAH is ordered to serve verified responses, without objection, to Plaintiff's Request for Production of Documents, Set One, Plaintiff's Special Interrogatories, Set One, and Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories - General, by June 3, 2016 at 5 p.m. Prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
